title: Seven members of Iran's women's football team have sought asylum, ABC understands

comments.body:
Interesting how quickly some of the girls removed their hijabs

Many tout it as a choice, but I find it interesting that as soon as they're granted asylum, the hijab comes off...

Disclaimer: This isn't anti Muslim sentiment btw, and it isn't meant to condemn any woman. This is an anti-women's oppression sentiment. Interpret that how you will
Yeah that country sucks for women. Maybe if the US hadn't toppled their democratically elected secular government decades ago, it wouldn't be so bad now.
I imagine they're faster runners than their handlers. I'd be sprinting as soon as I saw an opportunity to break away.
Wait, Iran isn't the good guys?!
